rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description ('Cana Vespenalis') as it visually matches the script more closely than gpt-5-mini's 'Para Vesperialy.'. Both extractors agreed on row type and no associated monetary amounts.

Monetary amounts (£8 0s 0d) are consistent across extractors and clearly visible. The description was refined to 'Monsted' (from gemini-flash's 'Monshead' and gpt-5-mini's 'Morsted') based on visual verification, and 'Mr' capitalized.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Entries relating to named individuals Mr Churchill, Monsted, Cholwich, and Blake, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are consistent across extractors and clearly visible. Selected gemini-flash's description for correct capitalization ('From') and the trailing dash, unlike gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: July 24 From Cash Received of ½th of £900 3. p Cent.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description ('½th' and capitalized 'From'). Visually verified pence as '5', not '6' as in gpt-5-mini. Pounds and shillings match between both extractors.
rows.english_description: Cash received representing one half of the interest on £900 at 3 percent.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cash received of one-half of the interest on £900 at 3 percent, amounting to £901 2s 5d.

rows.description: Aug. 5 From Mr Weston ½ Expences of fine upon pay
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description and monetary amounts. Visual verification confirms pence as '9' and fraction as 'q' (0.25). gpt-5-mini's description incorrectly merges this line with the next, and provided incorrect pence (6) and fraction (0.75).
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Weston for half the expenses of a fine connected with a payment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Weston for half the expenses of a fine connected with a payment, amounting to £2 14s 9.25d.

rows.description: ing up the 800. £ due to younger Children —
rows.notes: This row was only identified as a separate line by gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms it is a continuation of the description from row 9, with no associated monetary amount on this specific line. The trailing dash is also present.
rows.english_description: Note concerning payment up of the £800 due to the younger children.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note concerning payment up of the £800 due to the younger children.

rows.description: From ye Dean rem. of fees last year —
rows.notes: Monetary amounts are consistent across extractors and clearly visible. Description corrected from 'Rear rem. of fees' (gemini-flash) and 'Dean rem. of fey' (gpt-5-mini) to 'Dean rem. of fees' based on visual verification. 'From' capitalized and trailing dash included.
rows.english_description: Remittance from the Dean of fees from the previous year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Remittance from the Dean of fees from the previous year, amounting to £3 10s 2d.

rows.description: From ye Dean fees for Degrees for Sr Cholwich, Cobley
rows.notes: This is the first line of a multi-line entry, correctly identified by gemini-flash. Description corrected from 'Bear' (gemini-flash) to 'Dean' and capitalised 'From' based on visual verification. No amount present on this line.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the Dean for degree fees for Sir Cholwich and Cobley.

rows.notes: This is the second line of a multi-line entry, correctly identified by gemini-flash. Description corrected 'Heat' (gemini-flash) to 'Hext', and confirmed 'Wolbash' (gpt-5-mini had 'Wollbank') based on visual verification. No amount present on this line.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Degree fees for Moore, Hext, Scott, Wolbash, and Kennicott, amount not stated.

rows.notes: This is the third and final line of a multi-line entry, correctly identified by gemini-flash. Description corrected 'Bourn' (gpt-5-mini) to 'Bowne'. Visually confirmed amounts as £10 s10 d9 and fraction 'q' (0.25). gpt-5-mini had s16 and fraction 0.75.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Degree fees received from Seccombe, Ramsey, Bowne, and Rideout, amounting to £10 10s 9.25d.

rows.description: Oct. 24 From ye Dean fees for Degrees in full to June 30. —
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's amounts and fraction (£1 0s 0d, 0.75), which are clearly visible upon visual inspection despite gpt-5-mini's low confidence and blank amounts. Description corrected from 'Rear' (gemini-flash) to 'Dean' and capitalised 'From'. Trailing dash included.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from the Dean of degree fees in full up to 30 June, amounting to £1 0s 0.75d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Transfer to the accounts of cash received representing two years' dividends, amount not stated.

rows.description: of £900 3. p Cent. to mids. last in full —
